# Variant naming system

## Variant factor naming

```text
FACTOR-[FAMILY]-[VARIABLE]
```

Examples:

```text
FACTOR-ATT-FIRSTFRAME
FACTOR-TEN-HOOKTYPE
FACTOR-COG-TEXTDENSITY
FACTOR-ACT-CTA
```

## Variant level naming

```text
V-[LETTER]-[LEVEL]
```

Examples:

```text
V-A-FACE
V-B-BEFOREAFTER
V-C-RESULTFIRST
V-D-PROOFGRAPH
V-E-MISTAKEVISIBLE
```

## Multi-factor naming

```text
V-A1B2C1
```

Where:

```text
A = first-frame level
B = hook level
C = CTA level
```

Only use multi-factor codes in factorial designs. For normal testing, keep variants plain.
